author: Iker Moel Tacher
name: VRS: Void Rescue System for Regression-Based Transformers
blurb: Non-record 8xH100 JEPA-style regression submission with a 524,288-parameter rescue decoder. Across 3 ten-minute seeds, VRS averaged 1.8667 val_bpb while the raw regression path averaged 1.9436, and it also beat standalone regression-only baselines. The best included run reached 1.8658 val_bpb under the 16MB artifact cap.
